headline: Truist Raises its Price Target on Equity Residential (EQR)
summary: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) is one of the 10 Interest Rate Sensitive Stocks to Buy Now. On June 16, 2026, Truist analyst Michael Lewis raised the firm’s price target on Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) to $72 from $70 and kept a Buy rating. Lewis adjusted Truist’s model with expectations for 2.2% year-over-year same-store revenue growth in 2026 […]
